sql:
SELECT  TC.TICKET_ID
                , TC.PARENT_TICKET_ID 
                , TC.FAULT_TIME
                , CASE WHEN TC.STATUS = 'AUTO_FIN' 
                    THEN TC.TICKET_UPDATE_TIME 
                    ELSE SOP.HANDLING_FIN_TIME 
                 END AS HANDLING_FIN_TIME
                , TC.TICKET_TYPE
                , TC.TICKET_RCA_RESULT_DTL_CODE
                , TC.STATUS 
                , TA.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA
                , TA.ROOT_CAUSE_PORTA
                , TA.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEZ
                , TA.ROOT_CAUSE_PORTZ
        FROM    rca.tb_rca_ticket_current TC
        INNER JOIN rca.tb_rca_ticket_al_current TA ON TC.TICKET_ID = TA.TICKET_ID
        LEFT JOIN NIA.TB_SOP SOP ON TC.TICKET_ID = SOP.TICKET_ID
         WHERE (  TC.TICKET_TYPE = 'ATT2'
                    AND TC.FAULT_TIME  >  RCA.FC_GET_MINUS_DAY(7) ) 
        ORDER BY TC.TICKET_ID DESC
            LIMIT 100 OFFSET 0
